name: Blend Labs, Inc.
business: Blend Labs provides a cloud-based software platform for financial institutions to digitize loan origination and consumer banking processes. Its platform supports mortgages, home equity, vehicle loans, credit cards, personal loans, and deposit accounts. The company sells to banks, credit unions, independent mortgage banks, and mortgage servicers in the United States.

exposures.sentence: Blend (NYSE: BLND) is on a mission to transform the financial services industry by making the process of obtaining a loan or opening an account as seamless and intuitive as modern e-commerce.

we generate revenue through integrated partnership models, where we earn a fixed or variable share of revenue from third-party providers for services facilitated through our platform, such as income and identity verification and homeowners and title insurance.

Our platform comprises a suite of products that power the origination process from back end workflows, Loan Team and Banker tools to consumer experience. Our growing suite of SaaS products currently enables digital-first consumer application journeys for mortgages, home equity loans and lines of credit, vehicle loans, personal loans, credit cards, and deposit accounts.

catalysts.event: Completion of sale of title insurance business to Covius Services, LLC
catalysts.sentence: on March 1, 2026, we completed the sale of substantially all the assets and liabilities of our title insurance business to a third party.

catalysts.event: Authorization of share repurchase program up to $50 million
catalysts.sentence: On March 10, 2026, the Company's board of directors authorized the repurchase of up to $50.0 million of the Company’s Class A common stock.
